name: Deep Rewind and Incremental Finetune Demonstration
description: Scenario designed to demonstrate deep rewind and deep incremental finetune features. Client 2 performs a full exclusion from rounds 1-7, client 1 performs a permanent inbound exclusion of client 0 from round 3, and client 4 performs a permanent outbound exclusion of client 0 from round 1, creating complex multi-track dynamics and allowing the system to showcase rewind capabilities and incremental finetuning.

expected_tracks.track_0_no4: For client 0, excluding client 4 (due to client 4's outbound exclusion)
expected_tracks.global: Global track for clients 0, 1, 3, 4 (rounds 1-2, client 2 fully excluded)

expected_tracks_round_3.track_0_no4: For client 0, excluding client 4 (due to client 4's outbound exclusion)
expected_tracks_round_3.global: Global track for clients 0, 3, 4 (client 2 fully excluded)

expected_tracks_round_4.track_0_no4: For client 0, excluding client 4 (due to client 4's outbound exclusion)
expected_tracks_round_4.global: Global track for clients 0, 3, 4 (client 2 fully excluded)

expected_tracks_round_5.track_0_no4: For client 0, excluding client 4 (due to client 4's outbound exclusion)
expected_tracks_round_5.global: Global track for clients 0, 3, 4 (client 2 fully excluded)

expected_tracks_round_6.track_0_no4: For client 0, excluding client 4 (due to client 4's outbound exclusion)
expected_tracks_round_6.global: Global track for clients 0, 3, 4 (client 2 fully excluded)

expected_tracks_round_7.track_0_no4: For client 0, excluding client 4 (due to client 4's outbound exclusion)
expected_tracks_round_7.global: Global track for clients 0, 3, 4 (client 2 fully excluded)

expected_tracks_round_8.track_0_no4: For client 0, excluding client 4 (due to client 4's outbound exclusion)
expected_tracks_round_8.track_1_no0: For client 1, excluding client 0 (permanent inbound exclusion)
expected_tracks_round_8.global: Global track for clients 0, 2, 3, 4 (client 2 rejoins after full exclusion)

expected_tracks_round_9.track_0_no4: For client 0, excluding client 4 (due to client 4's outbound exclusion)
expected_tracks_round_9.track_1_no0: For client 1, excluding client 0 (permanent inbound exclusion)
expected_tracks_round_9.global: Global track for clients 0, 2, 3, 4 (client 2 rejoins after full exclusion)

expected_tracks_round_10.track_0_no4: For client 0, excluding client 4 (due to client 4's outbound exclusion)
expected_tracks_round_10.track_1_no0: For client 1, excluding client 0 (permanent inbound exclusion)
expected_tracks_round_10.global: Global track for clients 0, 2, 3, 4 (client 2 rejoins after full exclusion)

round_1_rules.description: Client 2 should be fully excluded from all tracks
Client 0's track should exclude client 4 (due to client 4's outbound exclusion)
Clients 0, 1, 3, 4 should be on the global track

round_3_rules.description: Client 2 should still be fully excluded from all tracks
Client 0's track should exclude client 4 (due to client 4's outbound exclusion)
Client 1's track should exclude client 0 (inbound exclusion)
Clients 0, 3, 4 should be on the global track

round_8_rules.description: Client 0's track should still exclude client 4 (due to client 4's outbound exclusion)
Client 1's track should still exclude client 0 (permanent inbound exclusion)
Clients 0, 2, 3, 4 should be on the global track (client 2 rejoins)
